full_text:
Meng Guang (Xiaoyu) 孟光 (孝裕)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Meng Guang (孟光), styledXiaoyu (孝裕), was born in Henan. Raised concerns over Liu Xuan’s education, an arrogant but bright scholar. Meng Guang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Liu Yan, Liu Zhang, and the Shu Kingdom.
